name: Sim: Special Assistance - Wheelchair not arranged at destination on ZA221
scenario_description: Passenger requiring a wheelchair requested assistance 72 hours before departure. Wheelchair was not available upon arrival leaving the passenger stranded at the jet bridge.
complaint_description: I have a permanent mobility impairment and require wheelchair assistance at all airports. I requested both departure and arrival wheelchair service for PNR-SIM-006 and confirmed 72 hours before the March 9 2026 flight ZA221 from Los Angeles to Denver. A wheelchair was available at departure but upon landing in Denver no wheelchair or escort was waiting at the jet bridge. I waited over 30 minutes until a ground staff member noticed me. This is a serious failure in disability accommodation. I am requesting a formal apology confirmation of corrective action and compensation for the distress caused.
